insight: `/me` (CommandMe) has no Discord forwarding: it only broadcasts via Players.showMe locally plus a ChatControlProxyMessage.ME packet across backends, never calling HookManager.sendDiscordMessage. Discord delivery is exclusively per-channel (Discord_Channel_Id + Format_To_Discord) running on the backend Bukkit server via DiscordSRV; the proxy has no Discord hook, and the Me: settings section only has Enabled, Command_Aliases, Format.
